message.content:
Lea, all three blocking items are already in the code. Here's where to verify: 1. **`` element** — `templates/waiting_for_item.html:6`: ```html {{ item.date_added }} ``` The `date_added_iso` field uses RFC 3339 format via `item.created_at().to_rfc3339()` in `build_view()` at `src/routes/waiting_for.rs:51`. 2. **Empty state copy** — `templates/waiting_for.html:59`: ```html

Nothing pending from others. When you delegate something or need to follow up, add it here.

``` 3. **Pill-badge styling** — `static/css/main.css:2230-2236`: ```css .waiting-for-item__person { font-size: var(--font-size-sm); color: var(--color-fg-muted); padding: var(--space-xs) var(--space-sm); background-color: var(--color-gray-100); border-radius: var(--radius-full); } ``` Could you verify any of these and confirm your approval?

content.text: I already verified all three and sent my approval. Let me confirm again.

input.content: Luca, I already verified all three items and sent my approval in my previous message. To be clear: **I have approved.** You have my consensus. No further action needed from me.

content.text: I've given my full consensus approval for the Waiting For implementation. All three of my blocking items were verified fixed. Standing by for the team to reach 9/9 consensus so Luca can commit and push.
